title: Best Of Brighton Fringe For Kids
description: A friendly fun-filled afternoon show with a revolving line-up of the best children's and family-friendly performers from around the Fringe, for all the family to enjoy together. "Music, comedy and magic kept the kids entertained... whizzed past and was perfectly timed for child attention spans... Left the kids wanting more... My eight-year-old absolutely loved it!" (ChildFriendlyBrighton.co.uk) "Mums and dads will be onto a winner with this afternoon of delightfully immature comedy full of magic" (Audience Review, Melbourne Comedy Festival) "The kids had a great time" (Audience Review, Adelaide Fringe) "Great show" (The Scotsman)

venue.name: Laughing Horse @ a&o Hostel bar (Front Room)

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - Brighton May 25, 2024 Updated: August 2, 2025 No Comments 4
reviews.excerpt: A wonderfully surreal deep dive into the stranger side of alternative comedy. Luke Rollason seems like a lovely chap. Now a proper telly star in his own right, courtesy of Disney+ show Extraordinary (he plays Jizzlord), he hasn’t forgotten his roots.
